title: Architectural Coordinator
description:
Job Descriptions

• Responsible for the effective completion of Architectural Works within agreed time, cost, quality and safety

  • Planning of architectural work schedules in alignment to approved master construction program
  • Monitoring subcontractors’ works progress in achieving the agreed work schedules and/ work phases
  • Coordinating architectural works with other trades’ works to alleviate conflicts, dispute and abortive work
  • Ensuring architectural finishing works satisfies the Client’s quality expectations and Authorities’ requirements
  • Participating and inculcate subcontractors in performing safety, health and environmental aspects on site

• Coordination with Architect/ Consultants for technical/ shop-drawings submissions including Authorities’ Approval and materials’ approvals

• Submission of Works Method Statements for approval and arranging of trade demonstration

• Leading the Works for Mock-up Units (Sample Units) and to bring to completion within the agreed timeframe/ work phase

• Planning and monitoring of architectural materials/ special products requires longer procurement lead times

• Reviewing contract specifications and drawings and raise technical clarification for any discrepancy

• Resolve architectural detailing/ technical issues on site during the architectural work progression phases

• Preparations and coordination on QM/ CONQUAS Assessments

• Compilations and handing-over of Architectural documentations including As-built drawing submissions

Job Requirements

• Possess a Degree/ Diploma/ Certificate in Architectural and/ related discipline

• Proficient in Autocad and Microsoft Office applications

• Independent, competent and self-motivated with strong teamwork spirit

• Good technical & communication skills to interact with people at all levels on site

• Lead subcontractors in achieving smooth progress with higher quality standards and minimal defects

• Minimum 3 years experience, preferably with CONQUAS experience

• Completed QM project and a registered Core-trade Foremen/ Supervisor would be an added advantage

postedCompany.description:
Our Story

Since our founding in 1992, Teambuild Construction Group has transformed into a dynamic, multi-disciplinary powerhouse in the construction industry. Specializing in residential, institutional, and industrial projects, we pride ourselves on our commitment to technical excellence and high safety standards, earning us over 150 prestigious awards.

Leading the Way in Innovation

Teambuild is at the forefront of construction innovation. As pioneers of Prefabricated Pre-Finished Volumetric Construction (PPVC) in Singapore, we also embrace the latest in IDD and BIM technologies to stay ahead.

Investing in Our People

Our greatest asset is our talented team of over 1,200 employees. We are committed to nurturing their growth through our Career Mentorship Programme (CMP). This 6-year fast track programme transforms young engineers into Project Managers, providing comprehensive training in both technical and soft skills.

Embracing Technology

Our passion for technology and innovation ensures we lead the industry in construction excellence. We continuously adopt new advancements to maintain our competitive edge.

Be Part of Our Journey

At Teambuild Construction Group, we offer more than just a job; we provide a platform for growth and achievement. Experience a dynamic workplace where innovation and excellence thrive. Join us in Building Excellence and Shaping the Future!

Teambuild Construction Group - Building Excellence, Shaping the Future!
postedCompany.name: TEAMBUILD ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION PTE. LTD.
